rows.criterion: Tree built, written to index/name.idx, closed, and reopened yields identical Lookup results
Tree built, written to index/name.idx, closed, and reopened yields identical PrefixScan results
Reopen simulates a real process restart (new *os.File, new NodeStore, not reuse of in-memory tree)
Root ID is recoverable after reopen via LoadRoot, previously saved via SaveRoot
Fresh/never-persisted index file: LoadRoot returns reservedNodeID (0) with no error, not a crash
Tree exercises real multi-leaf structure (not a trivial single-node tree)
No regression in prior subtasks (1.2.1-1.2.5) test suites
